strengths: 15+ years of full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems
Exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No executive (CTO/VP) leadership experience or track record scaling teams from 10 to 30+
Limited demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems experience at scale
Minimal fintech-infrastructure depth (credit, liquidity, regulated trade decisioning)

key_factors.factor: Lack of executive leadership track record
Insufficient production multi-agent AI systems experience
Strong distributed systems and engineering craftsmanship background

response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned senior/staff individual contributor with broad polyglot engineering experience and some recent exposure to agentic AI tooling, but the role requires an executive-level leader with a demonstrated record of scaling engineering organizations, running production multi-agent AI systems, and deep fintech-infrastructure expertise — areas where the resume shows limited evidence.
